name: Detection of Turla Registry IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC is recognized as a Turla registry value.

Note: The rules Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events, Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Events have been excluded from this rule to avoid repetition, their purpose is to have a dedicated rule response.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, Audit.Object Access Success, System.Information
when the event matches "Registry Key" is not NULL OR "Registry Value Data" is not NULL AQL filter query

when the event matches (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES ('.*?(\\atctl).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(\\atctl).*') or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e97d-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e97d-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e96a-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e96a-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e969-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e969-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(screensaver).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(screensaver).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(49cbb1c7-97d1-485a-9ec1-a26065633066).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(49cbb1c7-97d1-485a-9ec1-a26065633066).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(zonepolicy).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(zonepolicy).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(59031a47-3f72-44a7-80c5-5595fe6b30ee).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(59031a47-3f72-44a7-80c5-5595fe6b30ee).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES ('.*?(windows\.wsqmcons).*') or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES ('.*?(windows\.wsqmcons).*') ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Detection of Turla Registry IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, Audit.Object Access Success, System.Information
AND when the event matches "Registry Key" is not NULL OR "Registry Value Data" is not NULL AQL filter query

AND when the event matches (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES ('.*?(\\atctl).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(\\atctl).*') or  (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e97d-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e97d-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') ) or  (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e96a-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e96a-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') ) or  (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e969-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(4d36e969-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318).*') ) or  (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(screensaver).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(screensaver).*') ) or  (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(49cbb1c7-97d1-485a-9ec1-a26065633066).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(49cbb1c7-97d1-485a-9ec1-a26065633066).*') ) or  (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(zonepolicy).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(zonepolicy).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES '.*?(59031a47-3f72-44a7-80c5-5595fe6b30ee).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES '.*?(59031a47-3f72-44a7-80c5-5595fe6b30ee).*') ) or (LOWER("registry key") MATCHES ('.*?(windows\.wsqmcons).*')  or LOWER("registry value data") MATCHES ('.*?(windows\.wsqmcons).*') ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detection of Turla Registry IOC in Events
Event description: Detects when an IOC is recognized as a Turla directory and filename combination.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
